nasb.text: He had a son whose name was Saul, a choice and handsome man, and there was not a more handsome person than he among the sons of Israel; from his shoulders and up he was taller than any of the people.

esv.text: And he had a son whose name was Saul, a handsome young man. There was not a man among the people of Israel more handsome than he. From his shoulders upward he was taller than any of the people.

cnv.text: 他有一個兒子，名叫掃羅，既年輕又英俊；在以色列人中，沒有一個能比他更英俊的。他比人高出一個頭。

ccb.text: 他的儿子扫罗年轻英俊，在以色列人中无人能比，高出其他人一个头。
